# Project overview
- This is a TypeScript project using npm.
- We use Nuxt 4 and NuxtUI 4.
- This project is a proof of concept for a digital TTRPG GM using ollama and QWEN3.

# Coding standards
- Prefer strict TypeScript types. Avoid `any`.
- Use existing utility functions before creating new ones.
- Keep functions small and side effects explicit.
- Always reference the latest documentation for Nuxt, NuxtUI when implementing features.
- Typescript interfaces should start with an I and types with a T, i.e. ISomeInterface and TSomeType
